macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Indexes Rebound 1% Amid Oil Price Optimism and Strait of Hormuz Tanker Crossings
items.summary: Major US indexes including Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq rose around 1% on March 16, driven by better oil outlook following successful tanker crossings through the Strait of Hormuz. Tech and finance sectors led gains, with Nasdaq and S&P 500 forming tight bull channels near key support levels.

items.title: FOMC Meeting Underway as Critical Macro Event with Decision Due March 18
items.summary: The FOMC meeting on March 16-17 is the dominant macroeconomic event, with policy decision expected March 18 amid looming Fed and SNB decisions. USD/CHF steadies near 0.7900 as markets await outcomes; Pound Sterling plummets due to Fed-BoE policy divergence.

items.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent Warns of AI Trade Valuation Crisis and Private Credit Risks
items.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent highlighted compromised price discovery in AI stocks as the real market panic trigger, beyond selloffs. AI sector tremors from Nvidia's post-earnings drop and private credit strains, including potential $256B meltdown, are shaking infrastructure financing.

items.title: Trump Predicts Oil Prices to Plummet Post-Iran War
items.summary: US President Trump stated oil prices will 'plummet like rocks' once the war with Iran ends, contributing to stock rebound amid inverse oil-stock correlation.

items.title: Abra Plans Nasdaq Listing via $750M SPAC Deal
items.summary: Crypto firm Abra announced plans to list on Nasdaq through a $750 million SPAC transaction.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Breaches Key Resistance at $74,000 Amid Strong Upward Momentum
items.summary: Bitcoin (BTCUSD) has soared sharply, confirming a break above the $74,000 resistance level in a short-term corrective upward trend, supported by a trendline and EMA50, with positive signals from relative strength indicators suggesting further gains.

items.title: 20 Millionth Bitcoin Mined as Crypto Market Bounces
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market is rebounding ahead of a significant macro week, marked by the mining of the 20 millionth Bitcoin, highlighting network maturity.

items.title: TRUMP Token Rallies on Mar-a-Lago VIP Event Announcement
items.summary: The TRUMP token has rallied following news of a new VIP event at Mar-a-Lago, boosting interest in the project amid broader market recovery.

items.title: U.S. SEC and CFTC Align on Cryptocurrency Regulation
items.summary: The U.S. SEC and CFTC have aligned their positions on crypto oversight, potentially signaling progress in regulatory clarity for the sector.

items.title: Resurgence of Institutional Demand Drives Bitcoin and Ethereum Gains
items.summary: Institutional demand is fueling a constructive market phase for Bitcoin as a benchmark, Ethereum amid expanded exchange products, and top altcoins, with focus shifting to stablecoins, tokenization, and ETFs.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: University of Waterloo Study Reveals Top AI Coding Tools Fail 25% of Time
items.summary: New benchmarking research from the University of Waterloo shows leading AI models achieve only 75% accuracy on structured software development tasks, struggling with image, video, and website generation. The study emphasizes the need for human oversight in AI-assisted coding.

items.title: Optimal Blue Launches Virtual Economist AI Assistant for Mortgage Professionals
items.summary: Optimal Blue introduced the Virtual Economist, combining generative AI with proprietary machine learning models and real-time data to answer complex mortgage and economic questions. The tool is part of over 12 AI agents deployed to enhance lender efficiency.

items.title: Luiss University Partners with Google to Embed AI in Teaching, Research, and Operations
items.summary: Luiss Guido Carli University in Italy announced a collaboration with Google to integrate AI tools across teaching, learning, research, and campus life, including redesigning courses and developing digital skills.

items.title: OpenClaw Incident Exposes Security Risks in Experimental Agentic AI Tools
items.summary: The OpenClaw event demonstrates hidden security and compliance risks in agentic AI systems, highlighting the need for caution with experimental tools in sensitive applications.

items.title: AI Sector Rally Drives Artificial Superintelligence Alliance (FET) Up 70.5%
items.summary: The decentralized machine learning platform Artificial Superintelligence Alliance (FET) surged 70.5% amid a broader AI sector rally.

items.title: Ruthenium Prices Surge 212% Due to AI Infrastructure Demand
items.summary: Demand for ruthenium in AI hardware has driven prices to record highs, up 212% in 2026, underscoring supply chain pressures for AI development.

items.title: Stanwell Deploys Microsoft Azure AI Platform for Energy Trading and Forecasting
items.summary: Stanwell's Smart Machine Platform (SMP), built on Microsoft Azure AI, improved energy demand forecasting by 30% and enhanced trading decisions across the organization.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Black Ops 7 Counter Skies Event Pass Launches Early This Week
items.summary: Treyarch announced the Counter Skies event pass for Black Ops 7 starting tomorrow instead of Thursday, running until April 2nd, with free rewards including the Anvil conversion for the MXR turning it into the Black Ops 2 hammer.

items.title: Suitcase Stories Releases on Steam with 40% Launch Discount
items.summary: Suitcase Stories, a short relaxing organizing game with 27 suitcases to sort and 25 achievements, launched on Steam for $6.99, currently 40% off at $4.19 until March 24th.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
